73954.subject: Anthropic Talks Trust. OpenAI Is Building It.
73954.body:
There are just 15 spots left for accredited investors in The Disruptor’s Fund 2

StartEngine Private (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VWXWCl8RJXPbV33vN72TlJnQW7CpFKy5PQt3TN22w10l3pyd0W7Y8-PT6lZ3lTW4xvQCc628VqQW3rT3qQ4Ft132W8W-3PX1RgvRxN5JtJzJZhTzMW4-8XHd23-tffW2StGSh9c_VyLW2WsSck1sn92gW6xXVFy1N6KF3W9lvL-17pRZFBW8dPVwL5ZxJW4W8Xwr0z6MDn9rW249XQ36mzwLwW8dLrCs6QJfmGW1K4Hwk5_BpX1W8-_HjP5rvnxbW26F9Nc68bxl3W3NmLB1886W4CVcRjqT5X2D3bW1cPpcY2hbmczW3BFRQ_1rzqWbN4VMNYS9np7LW5yWFRH2q5WfWW4LPRcp4gHVk1N6l5H0YJTY5WW4kg8sL2003xcW24gkwj1wS4JQf4FwV7204 )

Disruptor's Fund 2 Exposure to OpenAI, Polymarket & More (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VWXWCl8RJXPbV33vN72TlJnQW7CpFKy5PQt3TN22w10F3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3nnW1FFv5G5r9-GCF12dLMV3wlwW3VfpzY8Wcq3cW5NNd4R925KQ5W36xHzh1K7GHrVQx8Ry3vsGJMVkSNJV50Khg5MRSrK9rlG3sN4nW01mDhsktW3S25rk4KkCD4N8_pSb4z6zZMN7SjZcwrX7y9W5jPwW-2KgrpRW93_KDC2zJSd0W6gWh1s5RH5H4W1zyTG64zh7YYW4MHh3F3h4FCHW1PYNw16plK-lW76JkGM1nJ91FW7j0Xlb9h4gm6W70fQ89367RBnW1t36wh5n9-8vVX7F1n3R3y9dW1T3x1B3fwPPPW2pb-CN26BXcSW18wMGQ4tcft0V32Vw62DBH0fW22nHNL4JKSSff6MzmDg04 )

Hi Oleg,

As the AI race heats up, reliability is becoming a battleground.

Anthropic has famously positioned itself as the go-to option for "trustworthy AI.” But last week, OpenAI received a noteworthy endorsement of its own.

A new deal with the Associated Press will bring live results into ChatGPT during major elections.¹

At the same time, OpenAI unveiled new cybersecurity and anti-misinformation initiatives aimed at protecting election systems and voters.²

Taken together, the moves suggest OpenAI is investing heavily in becoming a trusted source of information as more people turn to AI for answers. And the timing is notable.

OpenAI recently defeated Elon Musk in a major courtroom victory,³ beat Anthropic's Q1 revenue by roughly $1 billion,⁴ and is reportedly preparing to file for an IPO in the coming weeks.⁵

A confidential filing does not guarantee that an IPO will occur. These reports don't imply specific results for investors with exposure to OpenAI on StartEngine Private. Past performance is not indicative of future results. There's no guarantee that revenue, funding, or valuation will continue to grow, or that OpenAI will be profitable. See risks on the offering page.

Some investors are looking for access before any potential public debut.

That’s why we launched The Disruptor’s Fund 2 (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VWXWCl8RJXPbV33vN72TlJnQW7CpFKy5PQt3TN22w10F3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3nnW1FFv5G5r9-GCF12dLMV3wlwW3VfpzY8Wcq3cW5NNd4R925KQ5W36xHzh1K7GHrVQx8Ry3vsGJMVkSNJV50Khg5MRSrK9rlG3sN4nW01mDhsktW3S25rk4KkCD4N8_pSb4z6zZMN7SjZcwrX7y9W5jPwW-2KgrpRW93_KDC2zJSd0W6gWh1s5RH5H4W1zyTG64zh7YYW4MHh3F3h4FCHW1PYNw16plK-lW76JkGM1nJ91FW7j0Xlb9h4gm6W70fQ89367RBnW1t36wh5n9-8vVX7F1n3R3y9dW1T3x1B3fwPPPW2pb-CN26BXcSW18wMGQ4tcft0V32Vw62DBH0fW22nHNL4JKSSff6MzmDg04 ) . With one check, you can gain exposure to OpenAI and 9 o

73953.subject: Can the stockmarket swallow Anthropic, SpaceX and OpenAI?
73953.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTV9AAcAAAAAAjCdF-XAr_U6F3UnMxI9ne4-mFnJnlREx7vRFT9hrmS52CzJq9h7qQ_iUTjgeitJ3yF23CHOb08WwXCGsta4qs6ehf4pjJ72Im1T7nw0_P00BA 

June 2nd 2026

 

 
 
 

 The Economist Today
 


 Our best journalism, handpicked each day
 


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTV9AAcAAAAAAjCdF-XBQeh7ZUwdyz4v744-o5e1Qb_0eC8yB55IobKuKEsBRneRzQpU7FADBt0wPRKQuG8AIM9cfush8lGtwsfW1gAsDN_h4s330_VW1s9vqA 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTV9AAcAAAAAAjCdF-XCyUJIiECN5fVrCoDIwAObdI8NaZCmg3fDJl-OH7r2BDQqMwh_3wz1Jp3GjeNMMOEQ5WIG1E4aOuspaCagUQ0sqJnOPQJ_D9TU3r0gfQ 



 
 

Joshua Spencer

News editor



Anthropic announced on Monday that it has confidentially filed for an initial public offering, joining SpaceX and (reportedly) OpenAI in planning to list its shares. The three potential giga-IPOs could add as much as $4trn to the market value of listed American companies in a matter of months. Can the stockmarket handle this? Probably—but in the longer term, 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTV9AAcAAAAAAjCdF-XDSaPjnq8-TDLNy7xjqmM6V2xnlRPmTi_cBPiE5v3ymCi0wzTgLiFJAhrbFaCNfTf7lgGNvKkiopeLmoFMyQUXwB8_gtJzKrP_ 
expect some indigestion .


Ukraine is now Europe’s war. American efforts to end the conflict have fizzled. And almost all aid to Ukraine now flows from the old continent. Yet European leaders still

🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: Institutional conviction is tested as a rare sale by MicroStrategy and geopolitical tensions sparked a $1 billion liquidation event. However, aggressive treasury buys by Strive and major tokenization milestones by Franklin Templeton signal underlying market maturity. 🚨MicroStrategy (Strategy) Sells First Bitcoin Since 2022, Sparking $1B Liquidations Michael Saylor's firm disclosed selling 32 BTC for $2.5M to fund preferred stock dividends, ending a multi-year accumulation streak. Compounded by US-Iran geopolitical friction, the move triggered a flash crash below $69,000 and liquidated over $1 billion in leveraged positions. Read full story 💰Strive Adds 2,500 BTC to Treasury, Becomes 7th Largest Public Holder Asset manager Strive (ASST) capitalized on the market dip to acquire an additional 2,500 Bitcoin at an average price of $74,092. The purchase brings its total holdings to 19,000 BTC, signaling strong institutional buy-side support amid retail panic. See details 🏛️Franklin Templeton Partners with MoonPay for On-Chain Fund Access The $1.7 trillion asset manager is integrating its Benji Technology Platform with MoonPay Trade to facilitate seamless swaps between stablecoins and tokenized money market funds. The partnership provides institutions with 24/7 liquidity and yield through fully regulated blockchain workflows. See details 🌍Ripple Launches RLUSD Stablecoin in Turkey for Institutional Use Ripple has partnered with local exchanges BiLira, Bitexen, and Bitlo to bring its USD-backed stablecoin, RLUSD, to the Turkish market. Targeting one of the world's most active crypto economies, the move facilitates institutional enterprise payments and inflation hedging. Read full story ⛓️Hamilton Lane’s HLSCOPE Fund Debuts on Tron Blockchain via Securitize In a major shift for the RWA sector, Hamilton Lane has launched its Senior Credit Opportunities Fund on the Tron network. This marks the first Securitize-issued asset on Tron, leveraging the chain's massive stablecoin liquidity for institutional private credit. See details 📈Backpack Launches Securities Platform for 24/7 Stock Trading on Solana Crypto exchange Backpack has introduced "Backpack Securities," a platform blending traditional brokerage with on-chain tokenization. Users can trade real U.S. stocks and convert them into tokenized assets f

73950.subject: Letter from the CEO -- request for help
73950.body:
Your feedback will help guide our next chapter.

The Block ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

A message from our CEO

Hi,

I'm Steve Chung, and I recently joined The Block as CEO. Thank you for being a reader, subscriber, client or partner to The Block.

I wanted to reach out directly because I'd really like to hear from you. The Block already has a strong voice in this industry, but I know we can always do more to be useful to the people who read us, subscribe to us, work with us, and rely on our data and coverage.

It's also a fascinating time to be here.

Traditional finance, institutions, and blockchain markets are moving closer together in ways that felt much more theoretical not long ago. When I started my career on Wall Street as an analyst at Goldman Sachs 25 years ago, I could not have imagined that an industry like this would even exist.

That makes The Block's role even more important. Our job is to bring clarity, smart analysis, trusted data, and thoughtful reporting to a market that is changing quickly.

As I start this next chapter, I'd really value your feedback.

What do you think The Block does well? Where could we improve? What would you like to see more of from us?

Below is a short survey. I'd be grateful if you took a few minutes to share your thoughts.

Thanks for reading, and thanks for being part of The Block community.

Best,

Steve Chung
CEO, The Block

TAKE THE SURVEY ( https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfTCxwDhg00M2Y-OfeZJCmKPnUWymviONAGXTDKBZmf4q0d0g/viewform?usp=dialog&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Copyright © 2026

Advertise with us ( https://www.theblock.co/advertise?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Follow The Block on social:

Steve Chung, The Block CEO

769 Broadway #1198 , New York , NY 10003
